SEARCH
Package cloudpage.service

Class SecureSendService

java.lang.Object
cloudpage.service.SecureSendService
@Service public class SecureSendService extends Object
Creates, lists, revokes, and resolves expiring external links to individual files.

  • Constructor Summary
